arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Kobbie Mainoo told to leave because of Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United star Kobbie Mainoo might have been central to the 2-0 win over FCSB in the Europa League on Thursday, but the England international midfielder has bene told he would likely be best moving on from under Ruben Amorim's wing. Mainoo needs to leave Man Utd because of Amorim

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim drops long-term future hint for Kobbie Mainoo and reveals where he has been 'struggling a lot' after youngster starred in Man United's win over FCSB
arts.sum: United finished third in the group phase and sealed their spot in the last-16 after Diogo Dalot and Mainoo scored and registered an assist against the Romanian champions.

arts.ttl: Diogo Dalot lists three reasons why Kobbie Mainoo can star in new Manchester United position
arts.sum: Diogo Dalot was very impressed with Kobbie Mainoo's performance in the No.10 position in Man United's 2-0 win over FCSB.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes bold Europa League claim after Man Utd secure unique record
arts.sum: Manchester United beat FCSB in their final league phase match of this season's Europa League, with Diogo Dalot and Kobbie Mainoo scoring the goals away in Romania

arts.ttl: Man Utd trying to HIJACK Tel deal despite €60m agreement
arts.sum: Manchester United remain locked in talks with Bayern Munich in the hopes of hijacking Mathys Tel's proposed move to Tottenham, according to German media. According to the above-mentioned outlet, Man Utd initiated fresh talks, including with Tel's agent, on Thursday even after news had broken of the agreement with Tottenham.

arts.ttl: I spotted what Alejandro Garnacho did vs FCSB - it said something about his Manchester United future
arts.sum: Man Utd won 2-0 against FCSB in the Europa League on Thursday and here are the moments you might have missed.

arts.ttl: Friday’s briefing: Man Utd, Tottenham and Rangers into Europa League last 16
arts.sum: Chloe Kelly returned to Arsenal on loan from Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reacts to Man Utd win at FCSB
arts.sum: The joy of winning, the feeling of winning, but we will have two [free] weeks to work on our idea and to prepare for the games. We are in the next stage, we are going to prepare for the next stage, but the most important thing now is to recover.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo emulates Wayne Rooney feat in Man United's Europa League triumph over FCSB
arts.sum: Manchester United's Kobbie Mainoo emulates Wayne Rooney with a goal and assist in Thursday's 2-0 Europa League league phase triumph over FCSB.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo: Ruben Amorim agrees with pundit as 'brilliant' Manchester United star shines in new role
arts.sum: The midfielder scored and claimed an assist against FCSB
